62d98019f67c8a6f6e0ae3cb.question: Description acceptable Kenneth Jackson identified that this process caused differences in the etymologies of river names in four different areas. The "apartheid" theory attempts to explain the high level of genetic influence of this process because participants created unequal social structures. An account of this process lists several Bretwaldas, powerful men that may have been the top of a social elite created by this process. This process' displacement of native languages may have been encouraged by the uneven value of (*) wergild granted before the law. The writer Gildas' account of this process influenced later characterizations of it as a violent confrontation between its participants and the remnants of Roman aristocracy. The conversion of the people who had partaken in this process to Christianity is recounted in a history by the Most Venerable Bede. For 10 points, identify this process that came after Roman retreat from the central island, which created the kingdoms in the Heptarchy.
62d98019f67c8a6f6e0ae3cb.question_sanitized: Description acceptable Kenneth Jackson identified that this process caused differences in the etymologies of river names in four different areas. The "apartheid" theory attempts to explain the high level of genetic influence of this process because participants created unequal social structures. An account of this process lists several Bretwaldas, powerful men that may have been the top of a social elite created by this process. This process' displacement of native languages may have been encouraged by the uneven value of (*) wergild granted before the law. The writer Gildas' account of this process influenced later characterizations of it as a violent confrontation between its participants and the remnants of Roman aristocracy. The conversion of the people who had partaken in this process to Christianity is recounted in a history by the Most Venerable Bede. For 10 points, identify this process that came after Roman retreat from the central island, which created the kingdoms in the Heptarchy.
62d98019f67c8a6f6e0ae3cb.answer: the Anglo-Saxon settlement of Britain (accept any answer involving the spread of Anglo-Saxon culture or people, or the Anglo-Saxons invading Britain)
62d98019f67c8a6f6e0ae3cb.answer_sanitized: the Anglo-Saxon settlement of Britain (accept any answer involving the spread of Anglo-Saxon culture or people, or the Anglo-Saxons invading Britain)

62d98019f67c8a6f6e0ae470.question: A member of this family decries the Japanese as “sandal-wearing goldfish-tenders” after accusing an employee of stealing from him. That member of this family had earlier held a dance where he demanded that the band add a fourth beat to the “Blue Danube Waltz”, the resulting confusion of which allows another character to escape with his slave Virgil. A member of this family is shown laughing in the shower, church, and while asleep after reminiscing about crippling an Irish laborer with a bumper car in his youth. That member of this family uses “glower power” to scare off a group of hippies protesting his (*) germ warfare research facility. After a member of this family abandoned it as a child, a teddy bear named Bobo is owned by Charles Lindbergh and Hitler before being found by Bart Simpson. For 10 points, identify this family whose most famous member owns the Springfield Nuclear Power Plant.
62d98019f67c8a6f6e0ae470.question_sanitized: A member of this family decries the Japanese as "sandal-wearing goldfish-tenders" after accusing an employee of stealing from him. That member of this family had earlier held a dance where he demanded that the band add a fourth beat to the "Blue Danube Waltz", the resulting confusion of which allows another character to escape with his slave Virgil. A member of this family is shown laughing in the shower, church, and while asleep after reminiscing about crippling an Irish laborer with a bumper car in his youth. That member of this family uses "glower power" to scare off a group of hippies protesting his (*) germ warfare research facility. After a member of this family abandoned it as a child, a teddy bear named Bobo is owned by Charles Lindbergh and Hitler before being found by Bart Simpson. For 10 points, identify this family whose most famous member owns the Springfield Nuclear Power Plant.
62d98019f67c8a6f6e0ae470.answer: Burns family (accept Mr. Burns; accept Charles Montgomery Burns; accept Wainwright Montgomery Burns)
62d98019f67c8a6f6e0ae470.answer_sanitized: Burns family (accept Mr. Burns; accept Charles Montgomery Burns; accept Wainwright Montgomery Burns)
